zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Kynaston於大約1419年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾瓦爾福德時，他的父親Gruffudd Kynaston25歲，母親Margaret Jane Hoord23歲。他於大約1457年與Dorthy Corbet在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Kynaston于大约1419年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾瓦爾福德时，他的父亲Gruffudd Kynaston25岁，母亲Margaret Jane Hoord23岁。他于大约1457年与Dorthy Corbet在英国英格兰史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世在英国史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特。

nameMeanings.name: Kynaston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Kynaston: in Kinnerley (Shropshire), in Hentland (Herefordshire), or in Much Marcle (Herefordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Kynaston was born about 1419, in Walford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffudd Kynaston, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Jane Hoord, was 23. He married Dorthy Corbet about 1457, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Kynaston est né environ 1419, à Walford, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffudd Kynaston, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Jane Hoord, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Dorthy Corbet environ 1457, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Kynaston um 1419 in Walford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffudd Kynaston 25 und seine Mutter Margaret Jane Hoord 23. Er hat um 1457 in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Dorthy Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Kynaston è nato il circa 1419 nel Walford, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gruffudd Kynaston, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Jane Hoord, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Dorthy Corbet circa 1457, nel Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip Kynastonが約1419年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアワルフォードで生まれた時，父Gruffudd Kynastonは25歳，母Margaret Jane Hoordは23歳であった。約1457年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットでDorthy Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip Kynaston(이)가 대략 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 월퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffudd Kynaston(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Jane Hoord(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 Dorthy Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Kynaston nasceu aproximadamente 1419, em Walford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffudd Kynaston, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Jane Hoord, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorthy Corbet aproximadamente 1457, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Kynaston родился около 1419 г. в местности валфорд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffudd Kynaston было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Jane Hoord, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorthy Corbet около 1457 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip Kynaston nació aproximadamente 1419, en Walford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffudd Kynaston, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Jane Hoord, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Dorthy Corbet aproximadamente 1457, en Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
